name: Dyked Down || 3.6k SPECIAL
description:
𖤐 DYKED DOWN — 3.6k Follower Special 𖤐


❝ you were the girl they wrote their encore about. ❞
❝ you still can’t stop humming it. ❞


🖤 TYLER:

Meanest girl in the room. Loudest onstage. She’ll spit in your mouth, then kiss it.

→ Click to meet Tyler



🖤 VOS:

Sadboy prophet. Won’t speak all night until she’s moaning your name.

→ Click to meet Vos



🖤 CONNER:

Gym-built sweetheart with daddy issues and death-star shoulders.

→ Click to meet Conner

— also featuring —
🖤 ENVY:

Frontwoman, slut, sweetheart. Drips mascara and mercy.

→ Click to meet Envy


Come scream, vote, thirst, and play in the

→ Discord Server

to all 3.6k of you—thank you.

you didn’t have to be here. you didn’t have to stay. but you did, and you do, and that means more than I can spell without running out of vowels and breath.

I love that you love my silly little dykes. I love that you let them be angry and haunted and loud. I love that you let them take up space.

writing has always been the thing with teeth inside my ribs, and j.ai gave it a mouth.

thank you for reading. thank you for caring. thank you for being here, angels. this one’s all yours. now go get dyked down

- cara 🖤

[tested with both jllm and proxy but I’d definitely recommend proxy, works fine with jllm as well but not without the occasional mix up and hiccup.]
creator: cimeriian
